purpose: Transform authorized browser context into an evidence-backed, entity-resolved, actionable ANGELCARE commercial dossier and active Account 360 context.

operatingModes.label: Instant Scan
operatingModes.target: Immediate identity, public contacts, evidence, duplicate candidates and next action.

operatingModes.label: Deep Company Scan
operatingModes.target: Controlled same-origin research across identity, leadership, services, locations, contacts, news and partnerships.

operatingModes.label: Strategic Research Mission
operatingModes.target: Extended evidence, stakeholders, vertical signals, opportunity hypotheses, missing research and account strategy.

mandatoryArchitecture: Account search and context launcher independent from page scanning
Live browser adapter extraction before server interpretation
SSRF protection, DNS validation, robots.txt respect, bounded redirects, timeouts and page-size limits
Evidence ledger retaining source, excerpt, method, confidence and validation state
Organization resolution and explainable duplicate matching
Parent, branch, contact, vertical, signal and opportunity hypothesis extraction
Optional governed AI that can be disabled and cannot create verified facts
Persistent scan sessions, pages, facts, contacts, signals, hypotheses, decisions and errors
Guided transition from scan result to prospect, enrichment, account plan and opportunity
Active account context persistence and Account 360 hydration
Progress, partial, empty, error, review and success states
safetyBoundaries: No cross-origin server research in Scanner 2.0
No bypass of robots, authentication, rate limits or platform restrictions
No hidden extraction of full private Gmail or WhatsApp histories
No guessed people or email addresses presented as verified
No AI inference promoted to verified evidence without human or authoritative verification
truthfulnessRules: 45 assigned capabilities must never be displayed as 45 runtime-proven capabilities
AI is displayed as governed AI only when a configured provider successfully returns evidence-bound output
Partial or inaccessible sources remain visible
A successful build or registry check is not live scanner acceptance
acceptanceJourneys: Unknown website -> scan -> evidence -> duplicate search -> create prospect -> persist -> reload -> existing account recognition -> Account 360 hydration
Existing prospect -> high-confidence match -> open dossier without duplicate creation
Possible duplicate -> explain signals -> block silent creation -> user review
Deep scan -> multiple controlled same-origin pages -> partial-source diagnostics -> evidence ledger
Existing account launcher -> search 167+ authorized accounts -> select -> persist context -> hydrate Account 360
Scan result -> apply enrichment -> create account plan -> create opportunity
Access revoked during scan -> subsequent command denied and stale context cleared

liveCompleteRequires: real unknown and existing account journeys passed
